title: Cast expression needs to alter sub-expression's size

features.name: cast expression affecting shift operation size
features.description: Code should include a type-cast expression applied to a shift operation where the cast type width differs from the operand context width

features.name: cast type propagates to subexpression width
features.description: Code should include a cast expression where the cast type width should determine the intermediate computation width of the sub-expression

features.name: narrow_cast_on_shift_result
features.description: Code should include a narrow typedef cast applied to a shift expression with result assignment to a wider type
